allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''server/data/endesa.json'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Total registros:'', d.length\); console.log\(''Primer registro:'', d[0]?.date\); console.log\(''Ultimo registro:'', d[d.length-1]?.date\); console.log\(''Todas las fechas:'', d.map\(r=>r.date\).join\('', ''\)\)")
Bash(timeout 5 bash -c 'until curl -s http://localhost:4000/api/health > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done')
Bash(timeout 8 bash -c 'until curl -s http://localhost:4000/api/health > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done')
